title: Dummy Working Paper: A Template for Preview
abstract: A placeholder paper so you can see how the hub renders a real entry. Download and View open the generated PDF; Cite reveals a BibTeX snippet and copies it to the clipboard.

title: An Older Dummy Note on Nothing in Particular
abstract: Second dummy entry with a different date and tag set, so the sorting and tag filter have something to chew on. No PDF attached – the buttons will hide when the 'file' field is missing.
